nasb.text: He said to David, “You are more righteous than I; for you have dealt well with me, while I have dealt wickedly with you.

esv.text: He said to David, “You are more righteous than I, for you have repaid me good, whereas I have repaid you evil.

cnv.text: 對大衛說：“你比我公義，因為你以良善待我，我卻以惡待你。

ccb.text: 扫罗对大卫说：“你比我公义，因为你善待我，我却恶待你。
